chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2807 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 01-09-2022 Haji Shamsuddin Rajper, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- As per learned Counsel for the petitioner, the petitioner is not in contact with him for a long period. In view of order dated 15-12-2020, whereby Counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of the petition, instant petition is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
